name: morning-brief
description: Morning briefing — pipeline status, tasks for today, anything needing Alvaro's attention
prompt:
Good morning. Send a morning briefing to #forge-alerts for Alvaro covering:
1. What's in progress right now (tasks + which agent owns them)
2. What's waiting for review or Alvaro's approval
3. Top 2-3 priorities for today
4. Any blockers or issues to be aware of

Keep it short and scannable — bullets, not paragraphs. This goes to Slack #forge-alerts.
